item.title: Evan Turner dishes on all things Celtics
item.description: In this special preview edition of Still Poddable Jay King and Brian Robb are joined by former Celtics player and coach Evan Turner. Evan discussed: —His time with the Celtics and his connection to Boston —His relationship with Gordon Hayward and whether he really dodged a draft workout against him. —His favorite behind-the-scenes stories as a player and coach under Brad Stevens —Why he got out of coaching after one year —What he noticed about Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown while coaching them —His Celtics outlook for this season —The fallout from the Damian Lillard/Jrue Holiday trades and how he got involved —Re-living to the 2012 Eastern Conference Semifinals between his 76ers and the Celtics and reflecting on his Philly era To get the full interview, sign up at Patreon.com/Stillpoddable where you can become a member for free for the next 7 days, risk-free and get Celtics podcasts everyday. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices
item.itunes:title: Evan Turner dishes on all things Celtics
item.itunes:author: Brian Robb
item.itunes:subtitle: Evan Turner goes behind the scenes with us on his tenures with the Celtics
item.itunes:summary: In this special preview edition of Still Poddable Jay King and Brian Robb are joined by former Celtics player and coach Evan Turner. Evan discussed: —His time with the Celtics and his connection to Boston —His relationship with Gordon Hayward and whether he really dodged a draft workout against him. —His favorite behind-the-scenes stories as a player and coach under Brad Stevens —Why he got out of coaching after one year —What he noticed about Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown while coaching them —His Celtics outlook for this season —The fallout from the Damian Lillard/Jrue Holiday trades and how he got involved —Re-living to the 2012 Eastern Conference Semifinals between his 76ers and the Celtics and reflecting on his Philly era To get the full interview, sign up at Patreon.com/Stillpoddable where you can become a member for free for the next 7 days, risk-free and get Celtics podcasts everyday. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices
item.content:encoded:
In this special preview edition of Still Poddable Jay King and Brian Robb are joined by former Celtics player and coach Evan Turner.

Evan discussed:

—His time with the Celtics and his connection to Boston

—His relationship with Gordon Hayward and whether he really dodged a draft workout against him.

—His favorite behind-the-scenes stories as a player and coach under Brad Stevens

—Why he got out of coaching after one year

—What he noticed about Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown while coaching them

—His Celtics outlook for this season

—The fallout from the Damian Lillard/Jrue Holiday trades and how he got involved

—Re-living to the 2012 Eastern Conference Semifinals between his 76ers and the Celtics and reflecting on his Philly era

To get the full interview, sign up at Patreon.com/Stillpoddable where you can become a member for free for the next 7 days, risk-free and get Celtics podcasts everyday.

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: 8: Celtics-Pacers Takeaways
item.description: Brian and Michael break down the Celtics' first round sweep of the Pacers by going over takeaways. What did we learn about the C's during their dominant win and what will possibly translate over into a much tougher test in the Eastern Conference Semifinals? The guys also ask some big questions about the Bucks series and breakdown the latest NBA Finals odds. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: 7: Jayson Tatum is all grown up
